3138270.name: STUX.net
3138270.description:
You are the virus STUXnet, endowed with a special ability to compress axes. To carry out a hacker’s successful revenge, you must navigate through the computer system and take control of it according to the hacker’s commands. Good luck.

Unique 3-Way Axis Compression Logic




Axis compression is an ability that allows the player to change the stage from a 3D environment to a 2D environment. Players can clear stages by utilizing this core ability. The stages in STUXnet are based on this core gimmick of axis compression and are composed of additional gimmicks that build upon it.

A Unique Adventure Inside the Computer




STUXnet takes place in the unseen world inside a computer. The game features six chapters, each inspired by different computer components such as the motherboard, cooler, power supply, storage, GPU, and CPU. Each chapter contains unique gimmicks reminiscent of these components.
